headlines.description: Mexico's misery in World Cup opening games was finally ended as they secured a 2-0 win over South Africa at the Estadio Azteca in a match featuring three red cards.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico kick off WC with win over SA ft. 3 red cards

headlines.description: South Korea rallied from 0-1 down to defeat the Czech Republic 2-1 in the second match of the FIFA World Cup 2026.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oh, Hwang goals see South Korea edge Czechia in thriller

keyEvents.text: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Korea Republic).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Korea Republic 0, Czechia 1. Ladislav Krejcí (Czechia) header from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Vladimír Coufal.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Hwang Hee-Chan replaces Lee Jae-Sung.
Substitution, Czechia. Adam Hlozek replaces Pavel Sulc.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Chory replaces Patrik Schick.
Substitution, Czechia. Michal Sadílek replaces Lukás Provod.
Goal! Korea Republic 1, Czechia 1. Hwang In-Beom (Korea Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lee Kang-In.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Eom Ji-Sung replaces Lee Tae-Seok.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Oh Hyeon-Gyu replaces Son Heung-Min.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Korea Republic 2, Czechia 1. Oh Hyeon-Gyu (Korea Republic) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Hwang In-Beom.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Kim Jin-Gyu replaces Hwang In-Beom.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Park Jin-Seob replaces Paik Seung-Ho.
Substitution, Czechia. Mojmír Chytil replaces Alexandr Sojka.
Lee Gi-Hyuk (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

keyEvents.text: Goal! Mexico 1, South Africa 0. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Érik Lira.
Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Brian Gutiérrez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Mexico 1, South Africa 0.
Second Half begins Mexico 1, South Africa 0.
Yaya Sithole (South Africa) is shown the red card.
Substitution, South Africa. Thalente Mbatha replaces Lyle Foster.
Substitution, South Africa. Themba Zwane replaces Jayden Adams.
Substitution, Mexico. Luis Chávez replaces Brian Gutiérrez.
Substitution, Mexico. Gilberto Mora replaces Álvaro Fidalgo.
Goal! Mexico 2, South Africa 0. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Raúl Jiménez (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Nkosinathi Sibisi (South Africa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Mexico. Edson Álvarez replaces Érik Lira.
Substitution, Mexico. Armando González replaces Raúl Jiménez.
Substitution, South Africa. Evidence Makgopa replaces Iqraam Rayners.
Substitution, South Africa. Oswin Appollis replaces Aubrey Modiba.
Substitution, Mexico. Alexis Vega replaces Julián Quiñones.
Delay in match because of an injury Roberto Alvarado (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Themba Zwane (South Africa) is shown the red card for violent conduct.
César Montes (Mexico) is shown the red card.
